details.gold_claim: D-index small_teams higher negative correlation with team_size p < 0.001
D-index trend monotonically decreasing negative p < 0.001

gold_limitations: D-index definition depends on citation window choice
Team size is a proxy — doesn't capture collaboration structure

details.gold_claim: Ĉ distribution shape log-normal σ≈1.0-1.2 across all years null (invariant) consistent across 1945-2007
Field bias correction Ĉ eliminates field-level citation disparities null (unbiased) KS-test: Ĉ shows no field bias
Milestone paper recovery Ĉ ranks milestone papers consistently higher than C_raw positive for Ĉ Milestone rank improve

gold_significance: ks-test: ĉ shows no field bias
milestone rank improvement: higher percentiles under ĉ

gold_limitations: Relies on Web of Science coverage; may underrepresent non-English or non-journal literature
Cocitation data requires reference lists; older papers with incomplete reference data may be affected
T=10 citation window may disadvantage very recent papers with insufficient citation accumulation
Does not address citation motives (positive vs. negative citations)

details.gold_claim: Frontier-author patent forward citations +15-25% premium positive p < 0.01
Technology hit probability +30-50% higher likelihood positive p < 0.01
Generality/broad impact significantly broader positive p < 0.05
Kogan private value +20-30% premium positive p < 0.05
Frontier science reference mechanism Partial mediation confirmed positive Frontier-author premium persists even without

gold_significance: frontier-author premium persists even without frontier refs

gold_limitations: Analysis limited to biomedical sector; findings may not generalize to other industries (e.g., software, chemicals)
Selection on unobservables: frontier authors may select into firms/projects with inherently higher innovative potential
Author-inventor disambiguation may have false positives/negatives despite using validated linkage methods
Kogan private value data available for only 36% of sample (public firms only)
Causal interpretation limited: despite FE and matching, unobserved time-varying confounders may remain
Frontier science definition based on top-general journals may miss important frontier work in specialized outlets
